languages.text: Eogunn chooses an adjacent ally with augments installed and restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). Requires 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g} to be used, which are spent upon use. This ability can be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn chooses an adjacent ally with augments installed and restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). Requires 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g} to be used, which are spent upon use. This ability can be used once per combat.

languages.text: Eogunn targets an adjacent ally with at least 1 augment installed and restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. This ability can be used once per combat.
languages.original_text: Eogunn chooses an adjacent ally with augments installed and restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). Requires 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g} to be used, which are spent upon use. This ability can be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text:
Eogunn targets an adjacent ally affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}.
At the start of Eogunn's next turn, Eogunn restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). If the targeted ally is still adjacent, they also restore the same amount of wounds.
This ability can be used only once per combat.

Eogunn targets an adjacent ally affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}.
At the start of Eogunn's next turn, Eogunn restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). If the target ally is still adjacent to Eogunn, that ally also restores the same amount of wounds.
This ability can be used only once per combat.

Eogunn targets an adjacent ally affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}.
At the start of Eogunn's next turn, Eogunn restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). If the target ally is still adjacent to Eogunn, that ally also restores the same amount of wounds.
This ability can be used only once per combat.

Eogunn targets an adjacent ally affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}.
At the start of Eogunn's next turn, Eogunn restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). If the target ally is still adjacent to Eogunn, that ally also restores the same amount of wounds.
This ability can be used only once per combat.

languages.text: Эоганн выбирает стоящего на соседней клетке союзника, имеющего хотя бы 1 аугмент, и восстанавливает ему {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} здоровья (но не больше {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). Для использования этой способности у Эоганна должно быть не менее 2 уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}. Они снимаются после использования. Эту способность можно использовать один раз за бой.
languages.original_text: Eogunn targets an adjacent ally with at least 1 augment installed and restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. This ability can be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text:
Эоганн выбирает целью стоящего на соседней клетке союзника с эффектом {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священное железо{/g}.
В начале следующего хода Эоганн восстанавливает {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} здоровья (но не больше {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). Если выбранный союзник все еще находится на соседней клетке, этот союзник восстанавливает столько же здоровья.
Эту способность можно использовать только один раз за бой.

Эоганн выбирает целью стоящего на соседней клетке союзника с эффектом {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священное железо{/g}.
В начале следующего хода Эоганн восстанавливает {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} здоровья (но не больше {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). Если выбранный союзник все еще находится на соседней клетке, этот союзник восстанавливает столько же здоровья.
Эту способность можно использовать только один раз за бой.

languages.text: Eogunn elige como objetivo a un aliado adyacente con al menos 1 aumento instalado y le restaura {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} heridas (hasta un máximo de {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). Para usar esta capacidad, Eogunn debe tener al menos 2 acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}, que se eliminan tras su uso. Esta capacidad solo se puede usar una vez por combate.
languages.original_text: Eogunn targets an adjacent ally with at least 1 augment installed and restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. This ability can be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn elige como objetivo a un aliado adyacente con al menos 1 aumento instalado y le restaura {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} heridas (hasta un máximo de {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). Para usar esta capacidad, Eogunn debe tener al menos 2 acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}, que se eliminan tras su uso. Esta capacidad solo se puede usar una vez por combate.

languages.text: Eogunn visiert einen Verbündeten auf einem Nachbarfeld mit mindestens 1 installierten Augmentation an und regeneriert zu Beginn seines nächsten Zuges {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} Wunden (maximal {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). Für den Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit braucht Eogunn mindestens 2 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}, die anschließend entfernt wird. Diese Fähigkeit kann nur einmal pro Kampf eingesetzt werden.
languages.original_text: Eogunn targets an adjacent ally with at least 1 augment installed and restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. This ability can be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn visiert einen Verbündeten auf einem Nachbarfeld mit mindestens 1 installierten Augmentation an und regeneriert zu Beginn seines nächsten Zuges {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} Wunden (maximal {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). Für den Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit braucht Eogunn mindestens 2 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}, die anschließend entfernt wird. Diese Fähigkeit kann nur einmal pro Kampf eingesetzt werden.

languages.text: Eogunn cible un allié adjacent possédant au moins 1 augmentation, et restaure {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} blessures (jusqu'à un maximum de {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). Pour utiliser cette capacité, Eogunn doit disposer d'au moins 2 cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}, qui seront alors consommés. Cette capacité peut être utilisée une fois par combat.
languages.original_text: Eogunn targets an adjacent ally with at least 1 augment installed and restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. This ability can be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn cible un allié adjacent possédant au moins 1 augmentation, et restaure {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} blessures (jusqu'à un maximum de {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). Pour utiliser cette capacité, Eogunn doit disposer d'au moins 2 cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}, qui seront alors consommés. Cette capacité peut être utilisée une fois par combat.

languages.text: Eogunn, en az 1 ogment takılıyken bitişikteki bir dost birimi hedefler ve {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} sağlık puanı tazeler (maksimum {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). Eogunn'un bu kabiliyeti kullanabilmesi için en az 2 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi olması gerekir ve kullanım sonrası bu potansiyel enerji ortadan kalkar. Bu kabiliyet, her çatışmada bir kez kullanılabilir.
languages.original_text: Eogunn targets an adjacent ally with at least 1 augment installed and restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. This ability can be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn, en az 1 ogment takılıyken bitişikteki bir dost birimi hedefler ve {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} sağlık puanı tazeler (maksimum {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). Eogunn'un bu kabiliyeti kullanabilmesi için en az 2 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi olması gerekir ve kullanım sonrası bu potansiyel enerji ortadan kalkar. Bu kabiliyet, her çatışmada bir kez kullanılabilir.

languages.text: 伊奥贡选择一个相邻的、至少安装了一个植入物的盟友，为其恢复{uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}生命值（最高不超过{uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}）。 伊奥贡至少拥有2层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}，才能使用此能力，使用后消耗2层。 此能力每场战斗只能使用一次。
languages.original_text: Eogunn targets an adjacent ally with at least 1 augment installed and restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. This ability can be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡选择一个相邻的、至少安装了一个植入物的盟友，为其恢复{uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}生命值（最高不超过{uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}）。 伊奥贡至少拥有2层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}，才能使用此能力，使用后消耗2层。 此能力每场战斗只能使用一次。

languages.text:
エオガンは{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}フェルム・サンクトゥム{/g}の影響を受けている隣接した味方を対象とする。
エオガンの次のターン開始時、エオガンは{uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}の負傷を回復する（最大{uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}まで）。対象の味方がまだエオガンに隣接している場合、その味方も同量の負傷を回復する。
このアビリティは戦闘ごとに1回のみ使用できる。
languages.original_text:
Eogunn targets an adjacent ally affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}.
At the start of Eogunn's next turn, Eogunn restores {uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d} wounds (up to a maximum of {uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}). If the target ally is still adjacent to Eogunn, that ally also restores the same amount of wounds.
This ability can be used only once per combat.

traits.locale_text:
エオガンは{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}フェルム・サンクトゥム{/g}の影響を受けている隣接した味方を対象とする。
エオガンの次のターン開始時、エオガンは{uip|HealAmount|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}の負傷を回復する（最大{uip|HealLimit|66a1334321bc4000b9c19ee35614538d}まで）。対象の味方がまだエオガンに隣接している場合、その味方も同量の負傷を回復する。
このアビリティは戦闘ごとに1回のみ使用できる。
